scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend & wait
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma
